summaryMarkdown: Validated that the alpha smoke artifact already satisfies the scoped business requirement: one minimal markdown file with `Hello, world` and an alpha-specific unique id. No additional file changes were needed.
openRisks: No new write was performed in this resumed turn because the owned file was already compliant. Repo-wide quality gates and dev-log updates remain intentionally out of scope for this constrained subagent task.
